card_description: ICC is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies his 1974 experience as a "Discernment of the Present" rather than an "Anamnesis of the Past," concluding that Imperial Rome *exists now* in a metaphysical form."
